    1. Artist(Era, int)

Class Artist

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Abstract.Card
it.polimi.Game.Elements.Tribe
it.polimi.Abstract.Character
it.polimi.Characters.Artist
public class Artist extends Character
Represents an Artist character in the game. Artists contribute to the tribe's diversity and can be required for specific building effects, though they do not carry additional special attributes beyond their base character properties.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Artist(Era era, int players)
    Constructs an Artist character with the specified era and player count requirement.

  • Constructor Details

    • Artist

      public Artist(Era era, int players)
      Constructs an Artist character with the specified era and player count requirement.
      Parameters:
      era - the era during which this character is available
      players - the minimum number of players required for this character to be in the deck
